text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet strikes a series of poses in front of
a mirror by herself.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: There, fabulous! ...Wait, no, how about this?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's only you... Don't scare me like that.
choice_data_list: Sorry. I didn't mean to interrupt.
Sorry. I didn't mean to interrupt.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...I'm trying to figure out which pose would best
match my signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
They'll be taking my photo after I win, so I can't
afford to look sloppy!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But nothing feels quite right... What do you think
screams, "I'm number one!"?
choice_data_list:
Put your pointer finger up like you're number
one.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Number one, hm? I see! That does sound like me!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But now I'm wondering about the best way to
point...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Should I do it normally? Or should I lift up my arm
above my head? I could even make it a full-body
thing...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Argh, this is just turning into more work... I'm
going to try some different things out. You sit
there and watch, okay?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Be warned, you're not getting away until I figure
this out! This was your idea, so you'd better take
responsibility!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up watching her experiment with different
poses until the sun goes down.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ex-cuse me?! Was that supposed to be me?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I do not sound that childish! I'm way cooler and more mature!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, you didn't! That didn't sound like me at all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like she doesn't really know her own
habits. I've learned something new today.
